summary: Built portfolio report template (portfolio-template.html) and rewrote portfolio_report.py as self-contained script: connects to IB, fetches 5-day dark pool flow for all tickers including today, groups positions into structures, checks thesis vs entry flow, generates HTML with today-highlighted sparklines. Created context_constructor.py implementing context-engineering pipeline (Constructor + Evaluator stages). Seeded 7 persistent facts from evaluation history.
